label: content
narrative: Lesson 06-06 section opener. Only the section title '運用プロセスと保守プロセス' is extracted as an entity; body prose is descriptive narrative covered by other lesson pages. Translations zh '运行过程与维护过程' and en 'Operation Process and Maintenance Process' are semantically faithful. Body content not extracted is not release-impacting because subsequent pages carry the term definitions.
